text: Hello. Hello. Hey, good morning. James, you're from Nova Health Care, Pennsylvania. I'm calling to let you know about a cashback benefit that may help with out-of-pocket expenses of up to $10,000, especially during a hospital today. So to check whether you are eligible for this, may I know your age, please? I'm sorry, I couldn't quite catch that. Can you please share your age with me?
